description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default runner image and runs a before_script that executes 'apt-get update -qq', then 'apt-get install -y python python-dev', then downloads pip with 'curl -O https://bootstrap.pypa.io/get-pip.py', installs it via 'python get-pip.py', and finally installs tox version 2.3.1 using 'pip install tox==2.3.1'. Define a single job called linters in the default test stage that runs the command 'tox -e linters'. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are configured.
